title: alnus incana var. pinnatifida
intro: Alnus incana var. pinnatifida, also known as the Green Alder or Mountain Alder, is a variety of the Green Alder tree, characterized by its distinctive pinnate leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been attributed to the presence of tannins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits associated with Alnus incana var. pinnatifida include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
